ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Belt, Shoes, Shirt) */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The minimum stock level that triggers a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity to reorder when the stock level falls below the reorder level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the inventory is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory within the store */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product at the time of sale */,
  "ext_price" REAL /* Extended price (total price for the quantity sold) */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card, PayPal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, sales associate, financial analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the user is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the store */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the store was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the store details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
